## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Review checklist

- [ ] I ran `flutter analyze` and fixed issues.
- [ ] I ran `flutter test` and all tests passed.
- [ ] I confirmed new imports/files exist and compile (no unresolved package/file imports).
- [ ] I did **not** claim local checks I did not run.
- [ ] I included logs or CI links for any failing checks with follow-up actions.
